breakdown: This PR fixes the normalization of rewards_box in streaming passthrough by handling alternative key names ('xp'/'gold_pieces' vs 'xp_gained'/'gold'). The changes include the normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function now checking for fallback keys and popping them after normalization, plus applying this normalization in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair. Naming is clear, type safety good with coerce_int and isinstance checks, but documentation is minimal with only the existing comment explaining the boolean rationale.
key_changes: Added fallback key handling in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui: checks 'xp' if 'xp_gained' is None, 'gold_pieces' if 'gold' is None
Added .pop() calls to remove raw fallback keys after normalization
Applied normalize_rewards_box_for_ui in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair for passthrough rewards
New test file testing_mcp/test_streaming_passthrough_normalization.py added to verify normalization with messy keys
